description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The exterior features a combination of smooth gray and black surfaces, large vertical and horizontal windows, and integrated greenery with several trees and shrubs on the property and rooftop. The house includes an expansive outdoor terrace with lounge seating, a dining area, and a rectangular swimming pool. The design emphasizes open spaces, clean lines, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas. The main entryway is understated, blending seamlessly into the facade, and the overall structure is characterized by geometric forms and a sleek, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, rooftop greenery, and an outdoor terrace with a pool. The design features clean lines and a minimalist, contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pool, terrace with lounge and dining areas, and rooftop greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, large trees, and the house's geometric structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying vertical window strips and rooftop vegetation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with terrace furniture, pool, and additional trees visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical and horizontal strips
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist flush entry with no visible steps, porch, or decorative elements, blending into the facade
